page.title: Plugin Features
page.desc: Local plugins can be imported using file.zip2

action.title: Unpack payload bin

param.name: img
param.title: Please select the partition to extract. If not selected, all：

action.lock: if [[ -f $DNA_PRO/payload.bin ]]; then echo 'unlocked' else echo 'payload.bin not found' fi

param.name: BR
param.title: Please select br file：
param.desc: Put your file inside /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: DAT
param.title: Please select dat file：
param.desc: put your file inside /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: IMG
param.title: Please select img file：
param.desc: Put your file inside /sdcard/DNA project path. The tool automatically identifies the img format and unpacks it (While unpacking super, only the a_partition files will be extracted.)

action.title: Unpack super

param.name: img
param.title: Please select the partition to extract. If not selected, all：

action.lock: if [[ -f $DNA_PRO/super.img ]]; then echo 'unlocked' else echo 'super.img not found' fi

param.name: IMG_DIR
param.desc: IMG repacking format will be detected automatically

param.name: Read
param.label: RW
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to ext4

param.name: Pack
param.label: Size
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to ext4

param.name: img_type
param.label: img format
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to ext4 or erofs

param.name: repack_from
param.label: File format
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to ext4 or erofs

param.name: brze
param.label: br Compression level
param.desc: Note: Larger number may end up doing repacking process slow

param.name: erofsze
param.label: Erofs(f2fs) compression level
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to Erofs(f2fs)

param.name: type
param.label: Type
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to Erofs

param.name: test
param.label: Compress ext4 img space
param.desc: Note: Use only if you are repacking to ext4

param.name: test1
param.label: Remove avb data encryption
param.desc: Note: This switch will modify fstab file, which is not universal and may cause bootloop.

param.name: size
param.label: super.img total size
param.desc: Enter your super img size, default value is 8.5G.

param.name: super_group
param.label: Cluster name
param.desc: If you don't know, just use the default.

param.name: IMG_NAME
param.title: Please select the IMG file to be repacked：
param.desc: Put your file in the /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: IMG
param.title: Please select IMG file：
param.desc: Put your files in the /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: brze
param.label: BR Compression Level
param.desc: Note: Note: Larger number may end up doing repacking process slow

param.name: IMG
param.title: Please select IMG file：
param.desc: Put your files in the /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: ZST
param.title: Please select file:
param.desc: Put your files in the /sdcard/DNA project path

param.name: level
param.label: zstd compression level
param.desc: Note: The larger the number, the slower the compression!

param.name: IMG
param.title: Please select the segmented IMG file
param.desc: Identify the files in the /sdcard/DNA project path
